response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to detect vocal music segments. Identified one vocal performance: 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' performed by AZKi and IRyS (starting 03:00). 2. Used search tool to find the lyrics for 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' by original artist Yoko Takahashi. 3. Mapped the scenes based on visual and content transitions. 4. Generated the JSON with metadata and lyrics as required.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing the announcement of the 'AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover' concert, featuring a segment dedicated to a 'Heisei vs. Reiwa Anison' battle. The video includes a performance of 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' by AZKi and IRyS.

scenes.description: Intro animation featuring silhouettes of various performers and the 'AZKi 8th Birthday Live' title.
AZKi speaks on stage to the audience about the 'Crossover' concert.
Introductory promotion for the 'Heisei vs. Reiwa Anison' battle segment, featuring IRyS and Oto no Sen Kanade.
Short transition and setup on stage.
Performance of 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' by AZKi and IRyS.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
残酷な天使のように 少年よ神話になれ
蒼い風がいま 胸のドアを叩いても
私だけをただ見つめて 微笑んでるあなた
そっとふれるもの もとめることに夢中で
運命さえまだ知らない いたいけな瞳
だけどいつか気付くでしょう その背中には
遥か未来めざすための 羽根があること
残酷な天使のテーゼ 窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
ほとばしる熱いパトスで 思い出を裏切るなら
この宇宙を抱いて輝く 少年よ神話になれ
ずっと眠ってる 私の愛の揺りかご
あなただけが 夢の使者に 呼ばれる朝がくる
細い首筋を 月あかりが映してる
世界中の時を止めて 閉じこめたいけど
もしもふたり逢えたことに 意味があるなら
私はそう 自由を知る ためのバイブル
残酷な天使のテーゼ 悲しみがそしてはじまる
抱きしめた命のかたち その夢に目覚めたとき
誰よりも光を放つ 少年よ神話になれ
人は愛をつむぎながら 歴史をつくる
女神なんてなれないまま 私は生きる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like a cruel angel, young boy, become a myth.
Even if the blue wind now knocks on your heart's door,
You are just staring at me and smiling.
Absorbed in seeking what you gently touch,
You don't even know your fate yet, those innocent eyes.
But someday you'll notice,
That on your back, there are wings meant to aim for the distant future.
A cruel angel's thesis, soon you will fly from the windowsill.
If you betray your memories with overflowing, hot pathos,
Embrace this universe and shine, young boy, become a myth.
Always sleeping, the cradle of my love,
The morning will come when only you are called by the messenger of dreams.
Moonlight reflects on your slender neck,
I want to stop time in the world and shut it away, but
If there is meaning in the two of us meeting,
I am, yes, the bible to know freedom.
A cruel angel's thesis, and then sadness begins.
The form of the life we held tight,
When you wake up in that dream,
You will radiate more light than anyone, young boy, become a myth.
People weave love while creating history,
I will live without being able to become a goddess.
